content.content:
1→---
     2→task: h-implement-transflow-mvp
     3→branch: feature/transflow-mvp-completion
     4→status: in-progress
     5→created: 2025-01-09
     6→modules: [transflow, kb, ployman, api, storage, orchestration, testing]
     7→---
     8→
     9→# Transflow MVP Completion & Verification
    10→
    11→## Problem/Goal
    12→Complete the final missing components for Transflow MVP and ensure comprehensive TDD coverage with VPS integration testing. The MVP is 95% complete but requires KB implementation, comprehensive testing validation, and full end-to-end verification on VPS with real services.
    13→
    14→## Success Criteria
    15→- [ ] KB (Knowledge Base) read/write for learning fully implemented with TDD
    16→- [ ] Complete test suite coverage (60% minimum, 90% for critical components)  
    17→- [ ] All unit tests pass locally (RED/GREEN cycle complete)
    18→- [ ] Full integration testing on VPS with real services (REFACTOR phase)
    19→- [ ] End-to-end transflow workflows validated on VPS
    20→- [ ] Performance benchmarks established and passing
    21→- [ ] Documentation updated (FEATURES.md, CHANGELOG.md)
    22→- [ ] All MVP acceptance criteria from @roadmap/transflow/MVP.md verified
    23→
    24→## Context Files
    25→- @roadmap/transflow/MVP.md - Current MVP status and requirements
    26→- @roadmap/transflow/README.md - Stream overview and phases
    27→- @roadmap/transflow/stream-2/phase-1.md - LLM execution components  
    28→- @CLAUDE.md - TDD framework and VPS testing requirements
    29→- @docs/TESTING.md - Comprehensive testing strategy
    30→- @internal/kb/ - Knowledge base implementation area
    31→- @cmd/ploy/transflow.go - Main transflow CLI entry point
    32→
    33→## Implementation Strategy
    34→
    35→This task is broken into focused subtasks following strict TDD (RED-GREEN-REFACTOR):
    36→
    37→### Phase 1: Knowledge Base Implementation (RED-GREEN)
    38→1. **KB Schema & Storage** - Design and implement KB data structures
    39→2. **KB Learning Pipeline** - Implement read/write operations for case learning  
    40→3. **KB Integration** - Connect KB to transflow healing workflows
    41→
    42→### Phase 2: Test Coverage Validation (RED-GREEN) 
    43→4. **Unit Test Completion** - Ensure 60% minimum coverage across all components
    44→5. **Integration Test Validation** - Comprehensive component interaction testing
    45→6. **Mock Replacement** - Replace mocks with real service calls where possible
    46→
    47→### Phase 3: VPS Integration Testing (REFACTOR)
    48→7. **VPS Environment Setup** - Ensure VPS testing environment is ready
    49→8. **End-to-End Validation** - Full transflow workflows on VPS with real services
    50→9. **Performance Benchmarking** - Load testing and performance validation
    51→
    52→### Phase 4: Documentation & Verification
    53→10. **Documentation Updates** - FEATURES.md, CHANGELOG.md, API docs
    54→11. **MVP Acceptance Testing** - Final validation against all MVP criteria
    55→
    56→## User Notes
    57→
    58→**CRITICAL TDD Requirements:**
    59→- Every subtask MUST follow RED (write failing tests) → GREEN (minimal code) → REFACTOR (VPS testing)
    60→- Unit tests must pass locally before any VPS deployment
    61→- Integration tests must use real services on VPS (no mocks in REFACTOR phase)  
    62→- Coverage thresholds: 60% minimum, 90% for KB and critical healing components
    63→- All VPS tests must pass before task completion
    64→
    65→**VPS Testing Protocol:**
    66→- Deploy each component to VPS after GREEN phase
    67→- Run integration tests with real Nomad, SeaweedFS, Consul
    68→- Validate healing workflows with actual build failures
    69→- Test GitLab MR creation with real repositories
    70→- Performance test with production-like loads
    71→
    72→**KB Implementation Priority:**
    73→The Knowledge Base is the final missing MVP component and enables:
    74→- Learning from previous healing attempts
    75→- Deduplication of similar build errors
    76→- Improved healing success rates through historical patterns
    77→- Canonical error signatures and patch fingerprinting
    78→
    79→## Work Log
    80→- [2025-01-09] Created comprehensive task structure with TDD subtasks following CLAUDE.md requirements

content.content: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable

1→---
     2→task: 07-vps-environment-setup
     3→parent: h-implement-transflow-mvp
     4→branch: feature/transflow-mvp-completion
     5→status: pending
     6→created: 2025-01-09
     7→modules: [vps, infrastructure, testing, deployment]
     8→---
     9→
    10→# VPS Environment Setup for Transflow Testing
    11→
    12→## Problem/Goal
    13→Ensure the VPS testing environment is properly configured for comprehensive transflow MVP validation. This includes verifying all required services, setting up test data, and establishing proper access controls for integration testing as required by the CLAUDE.md REFACTOR phase.
    14→
    15→## Success Criteria
    16→
    17→### RED Phase (Environment Validation)
    18→- [x] Write failing tests that validate VPS service availability
    19→- [x] Write failing tests for VPS transflow configuration  
    20→- [x] Write failing tests for VPS KB storage setup
    21→- [x] Write failing tests for VPS performance baselines
    22→- [x] Document current VPS environment gaps and requirements
    23→
    24→### GREEN Phase (VPS Environment Ready)
    25→- [x] All required services running and healthy on VPS
    26→- [x] Transflow configuration deployed and validated on VPS  
    27→- [x] KB storage namespace configured in VPS SeaweedFS
    28→- [x] Test data and fixtures available on VPS
    29→- [x] Network connectivity and access controls verified
    30→- [x] VPS environment health checks pass
    31→- [x] Monitoring and logging configured for transflow testing
    32→
    33→### REFACTOR Phase (Production-Like Validation)
    34→- [ ] VPS environment mirrors production service topology
    35→- [ ] Performance characteristics match expected production loads
    36→- [ ] Security and access controls tested and validated
    37→- [ ] Automated deployment and rollback procedures tested
    38→- [ ] Full end-to-end transflow workflows validated on VPS
    39→
    40→## TDD Implementation Plan
    41→
    42→### 1. RED: Write Environment Validation Tests
    43→```bash
    44→# Test script: tests/vps/environment_validation_test.sh
    45→#!/bin/bash
    46→set -e
    47→
    48→# Should fail initially if VPS not properly configured
    49→TARGET_HOST=${TARGET_HOST:-45.12.75.241}
    50→
    51→echo "Testing VPS environment: $TARGET_HOST"
    52→
    53→# Test SSH access
    54→ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@$TARGET_HOST 'echo "SSH access OK"' || {
    55→    echo "FAIL: Cannot SSH to VPS"
    56→    exit 1
    57→}
    58→
    59→# Test service availability 
    60→ssh root@$TARGET_HOST 'su - ploy -c "
    61→    echo \"Checking Consul...\"
    62→    curl -f http://localhost:8500/v1/status/leader || exit 1
    63→    
    64→    echo \"Checking Nomad...\"
    65→    /opt/hashicorp/bin/nomad-job-manager.sh status || exit 1
    66→    
    67→    echo \"Checking SeaweedFS...\" 
    68→    curl -f http://localhost:9333/cluster/status || exit 1
    69→    curl -f http://localhost:8888/ || exit 1
    70→    
    71→    echo \"All services healthy\"
    72→"' || {
    73→    echo "FAIL: Required services not healthy on VPS"
    74→    exit 1
    75→}
    76→```
    77→
    78→```go
    79→// tests/vps/vps_integration_test.go  
    80→func TestVPSEnvironmentReadiness(t *testing.T) {
    81→    // Should fail initially - VPS may not be configured
    82→    
    83→    if os.Getenv("TARGET_HOST") == "" {
    84→        t.Skip("TARGET_HOST not set, skipping VPS tests")
    85→    }
    86→    
    87→    vpsClient := NewVPSClient(os.Getenv("TARGET_HOST"))
    88→    
    89→    // Test VPS service health
    90→    services := []string{"consul", "nomad", "seaweedfs-master", "seaweedfs-filer"}
    91→    for _, service := range services {
    92→        t.Run(fmt.Sprintf("service_%s", service), func(t *testing.T) {
    93→            healthy, err := vpsClient.CheckServiceHealth(service)
    94→            assert.NoError(t, err, "Should be able to check %s health", service)
    95→            assert.True(t, healthy, "Service %s should be healthy on VPS", service)
    96→        })
    97→    }
    98→    
    99→    // Test transflow CLI availability
   100→    output, err := vpsClient.RunCommand("su - ploy -c '/opt/ploy/bin/ploy --version'")
   101→    assert.NoError(t, err, "Should be able to run ploy CLI on VPS")
   102→    assert.Contains(t, output, "ploy version", "Ploy CLI should be installed")
   103→    
   104→    // Test transflow command availability
   105→    output, err = vpsClient.RunCommand("su - ploy -c '/opt/ploy/bin/ploy transflow --help'")
   106→    assert.NoError(t, err, "Transflow command should be available")
   107→    assert.Contains(t, output, "transflow", "Transflow subcommand should be available")
   108→}
   109→
   110→func TestVPSKBStorageSetup(t *testing.T) {
   111→    // Should fail initially - KB namespace may not exist
   112→    
   113→    vpsClient := NewVPSClient(os.Getenv("TARGET_HOST"))
   114→    
   115→    // Test KB namespace creation
   116→    cmd := `su - ploy -c "curl -X POST http://localhost:8888/kb/ -d 'mkdir kb namespace'"`
   117→    _, err := vpsClient.RunCommand(cmd)
   118→    assert.NoError(t, err, "Should be able to create KB namespace")
   119→    
   120→    // Test KB storage read/write
   121→    testKey := fmt.Sprintf("test-case-%d", time.Now().Unix())
   122→    testData := `{"test": "kb storage validation"}`
   123→    
   124→    // Write test data
   125→    writeCmd := fmt.Sprintf(`su - ploy -c "echo '%s' | curl -X POST http://localhost:8888/kb/test/%s -d @-"`, testData, testKey)
   126→    _, err = vpsClient.RunCommand(writeCmd)
   127→    assert.NoError(t, err, "Should be able to write KB test data")
   128→    
   129→    // Read test data back
   130→    readCmd := fmt.Sprintf(`su - ploy -c "curl -s http://localhost:8888/kb/test/%s"`, testKey)
   131→    output, err := vpsClient.RunCommand(readCmd)
   132→    assert.NoError(t, err, "Should be able to read KB test data")
   133→    assert.JSONEq(t, testData, output, "Retrieved data should match written data")
   134→    
   135→    // Cleanup test data
   136→    deleteCmd := fmt.Sprintf(`su - ploy -c "curl -X DELETE http://localhost:8888/kb/test/%s"`, testKey)
   137→    vpsClient.RunCommand(deleteCmd) // Best effort cleanup
   138→}
   139→```
   140→
   141→### 2. GREEN: VPS Environment Configuration
   142→```bash
   143→# VPS setup script: scripts/setup-vps-transflow-testing.sh
   144→#!/bin/bash
   145→set -e
   146→
   147→TARGET_HOST=${TARGET_HOST:-45.12.75.241}
   148→echo "Setting up transflow testing environment on: $TARGET_HOST"
   149→
   150→# Deploy latest transflow binary
   151→echo "Deploying transflow binary..."
   152→scp bin/ploy root@$TARGET_HOST:/opt/ploy/bin/ploy-new
   153→ssh root@$TARGET_HOST '
   154→    su - ploy -c "
   155→        mv /opt/ploy/bin/ploy /opt/ploy/bin/ploy-backup-$(date +%s) || true
   156→        mv /opt/ploy/bin/ploy-new /opt/ploy/bin/ploy
   157→        chmod +x /opt/ploy/bin/ploy
   158→    "
   159→'
   160→
   161→# Setup KB storage namespace  
   162→echo "Configuring KB storage..."
   163→ssh root@$TARGET_HOST 'su - ploy -c "
   164→    # Create KB directory structure in SeaweedFS
   165→    curl -X POST http://localhost:8888/kb/ || true
   166→    curl -X POST http://localhost:8888/kb/errors/ || true  
   167→    curl -X POST http://localhost:8888/kb/cases/ || true
   168→    curl -X POST http://localhost:8888/kb/summaries/ || true
   169→    curl -X POST http://localhost:8888/kb/patches/ || true
   170→    
   171→    # Setup Consul KV for KB locking
   172→    consul kv put kb/locks/.keeper \"kb-lock-namespace\" || true
   173→"'
   174→
   175→# Configure transflow test environment
   176→echo "Setting up transflow test configuration..."
   177→ssh root@$TARGET_HOST 'su - ploy -c "
   178→    mkdir -p /opt/ploy/test/transflow
   179→    cat > /opt/ploy/test/transflow/test-config.yaml << \"EOF\"
   180→version: v1alpha1
   181→consul_addr: localhost:8500
   182→nomad_addr: http://localhost:4646
   183→seaweedfs_master: http://localhost:9333  
   184→seaweedfs_filer: http://localhost:8888
   185→
   186→kb:
   187→  enabled: true
   188→  storage_url: http://localhost:8888
   189→  consul_addr: localhost:8500
   190→  timeout: 10s
   191→  max_retries: 3
   192→
   193→# Test repository for integration testing
   194→test_repos:
   195→  java_maven: https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git
   196→  
   197→# GitLab integration (use environment variables)  
   198→gitlab:
   199→  url: \${GITLAB_URL}
   200→  token: \${GITLAB_TOKEN}
   201→EOF
   202→"'
   203→
   204→# Setup test data and fixtures
   205→echo "Setting up test fixtures..."
   206→ssh root@$TARGET_HOST 'su - ploy -c "
   207→    mkdir -p /opt/ploy/test/fixtures
   208→    
   209→    # Create test transflow configuration
   210→    cat > /opt/ploy/test/fixtures/java-migration.yaml << \"EOF\"
   211→version: v1alpha1
   212→id: vps-test-java-migration
   213→target_repo: https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git  
   214→target_branch: refs/heads/main
   215→base_ref: refs/heads/main
   216→lane: C
   217→build_timeout: 10m
   218→
   219→steps:
   220→  - type: recipe
   221→    id: java-11-to-17
   222→    engine: openrewrite
   223→    recipes:
   224→      - org.openrewrite.java.migrate.Java11toJava17
   225→      - org.openrewrite.java.cleanup.CommonStaticAnalysis
   226→
   227→self_heal:
   228→  enabled: true
   229→  kb_learning: true
   230→  max_retries: 2
   231→  cooldown: 30s
   232→EOF
   233→"'
   234→
   235→echo "VPS environment setup complete!"
   236→echo "Run validation: TARGET_HOST=$TARGET_HOST make test-vps-environment"
   237→```
   238→
   239→### 3. REFACTOR: Production-Like Validation
   240→```go
   241→// tests/vps/production_validation_test.go
   242→func TestVPSProductionReadiness(t *testing.T) {
   243→    if os.Getenv("TARGET_HOST") == "" {
   244→        t.Skip("TARGET_HOST not set")
   245→    }
   246→    
   247→    vpsClient := NewVPSClient(os.Getenv("TARGET_HOST"))
   248→    
   249→    // Test production-like service topology
   250→    t.Run("ServiceTopology", func(t *testing.T) {
   251→        // Verify Consul cluster health
   252→        output, err := vpsClient.RunCommand("su - ploy -c 'consul members'")
   253→        assert.NoError(t, err)
   254→        assert.Contains(t, output, "alive", "Consul should be alive")
   255→        
   256→        // Verify Nomad cluster health  
   257→        output, err = vpsClient.RunCommand("su - ploy -c '/opt/hashicorp/bin/nomad-job-manager.sh node status'")
   258→        assert.NoError(t, err)
   259→        assert.Contains(t, output, "ready", "Nomad should be ready")
   260→        
   261→        // Verify SeaweedFS cluster health
   262→        output, err = vpsClient.RunCommand("su - ploy -c 'curl -s http://localhost:9333/cluster/status'")
   263→        assert.NoError(t, err)
   264→        assert.Contains(t, output, "Leader", "SeaweedFS should have leader")
   265→    })
   266→    
   267→    // Test performance characteristics  
   268→    t.Run("PerformanceBaseline", func(t *testing.T) {
   269→        // KB storage performance
   270→        start := time.Now()
   271→        testData := strings.Repeat("test", 1000) // 4KB test data
   272→        
   273→        cmd := fmt.Sprintf(`su - ploy -c "echo '%s' | curl -w '%%{time_total}' -X POST http://localhost:8888/kb/perf/test -d @-"`, testData)
   274→        output, err := vpsClient.RunCommand(cmd)
   275→        assert.NoError(t, err)
   276→        
   277→        duration := time.Since(start)
   278→        assert.True(t, duration < 2*time.Second, "KB storage should be responsive (<2s)")
   279→        
   280→        // Nomad job submission performance
   281→        start = time.Now()
   282→        jobHCL := `
   283→job "perf-test" {
   284→  type = "batch"
   285→  group "test" {
   286→    task "echo" {
   287→      driver = "raw_exec"
   288→      config {
   289→        command = "echo"
   290→        args = ["performance test"]
   291→      }
   292→    }
   293→  }
   294→}
   295→`
   296→        jobFile := fmt.Sprintf("/tmp/perf-test-%d.hcl", time.Now().Unix())
   297→        writeCmd := fmt.Sprintf(`su - ploy -c "cat > %s << 'EOF'\n%s\nEOF"`, jobFile, jobHCL)
   298→        _, err = vpsClient.RunCommand(writeCmd)
   299→        assert.NoError(t, err)
   300→        
   301→        submitCmd := fmt.Sprintf(`su - ploy -c "/opt/hashicorp/bin/nomad-job-manager.sh run %s"`, jobFile)
   302→        _, err = vpsClient.RunCommand(submitCmd)
   303→        assert.NoError(t, err)
   304→        
   305→        duration = time.Since(start)
   306→        assert.True(t, duration < 30*time.Second, "Job submission should be fast (<30s)")
   307→        
   308→        // Cleanup
   309→        vpsClient.RunCommand(fmt.Sprintf(`su - ploy -c "/opt/hashicorp/bin/nomad-job-manager.sh stop perf-test"`, ))
   310→        vpsClient.RunCommand(fmt.Sprintf(`su - ploy -c "rm -f %s"`, jobFile))
   311→    })
   312→}
   313→```
   314→
   315→## VPS Environment Requirements
   316→
   317→### Service Infrastructure
   318→```bash
   319→# Required services on VPS (should already be running):
   320→systemctl status consul
   321→systemctl status nomad
   322→systemctl status seaweedfs-master
   323→systemctl status seaweedfs-filer
   324→
   325→# Service endpoints:
   326→# Consul: http://localhost:8500  
   327→# Nomad: http://localhost:4646
   328→# SeaweedFS Master: http://localhost:9333
   329→# SeaweedFS Filer: http://localhost:8888
   330→```
   331→
   332→### Directory Structure on VPS
   333→```
   334→/opt/ploy/
   335→├── bin/ploy                    # Latest transflow-enabled binary
   336→├── test/
   337→│   ├── transflow/
   338→│   │   └── test-config.yaml    # Transflow test configuration
   339→│   └── fixtures/
   340→│       ├── java-migration.yaml # Test transflow configurations
   341→│       └── error-scenarios/     # Test error cases for healing
   342→└── logs/
   343→    └── transflow-tests/         # Test execution logs
   344→```
   345→
   346→### KB Storage Layout
   347→```
   348→# SeaweedFS KB namespace structure:
   349→/kb/
   350→├── errors/           # Error definitions by signature
   351→├── cases/           # Individual learning cases  
   352→├── summaries/       # Aggregated summaries
   353→├── patches/         # Deduplicated patch content
   354→└── test/           # Test data for validation
   355→```
   356→
   357→### Environment Variables on VPS
   358→```bash
   359→# Set in /opt/ploy/.env or ploy user profile:
   360→export CONSUL_HTTP_ADDR=localhost:8500
   361→export NOMAD_ADDR=http://localhost:4646  
   362→export SEAWEEDFS_MASTER=http://localhost:9333
   363→export SEAWEEDFS_FILER=http://localhost:8888
   364→
   365→# For GitLab integration testing:
   366→export GITLAB_URL=https://gitlab.com
   367→export GITLAB_TOKEN=<integration-test-token>
   368→
   369→# Transflow test configuration:
   370→export TRANSFLOW_CONFIG=/opt/ploy/test/transflow/test-config.yaml
   371→export TRANSFLOW_LOG_LEVEL=debug
   372→export TRANSFLOW_TEST_MODE=false  # Use real services on VPS
   373→```
   374→
   375→## Context Files
   376→- @CLAUDE.md - VPS testing requirements and protocols
   377→- @iac/vps/ - VPS infrastructure configuration  
   378→- @scripts/deploy-vps.sh - VPS deployment procedures
   379→- @TARGET_HOST environment variable - Current VPS endpoint
   380→
   381→## User Notes
   382→
   383→**VPS Access Requirements:**
   384→- SSH access to `root@$TARGET_HOST` (currently 45.12.75.241)
   385→- Switch to `ploy` user for application operations: `su - ploy`  
   386→- Use `/opt/hashicorp/bin/nomad-job-manager.sh` for Nomad operations (never direct `nomad`)
   387→
   388→**VPS Testing Protocol (CLAUDE.md):**
   389→1. Deploy code changes to VPS after GREEN phase passes locally
   390→2. Run integration tests with real VPS services (no mocks)
   391→3. Validate transflow workflows with actual build failures
   392→4. Test KB learning with real storage and locking
   393→5. Verify performance meets production requirements
   394→
   395→**Service Health Validation:**
   396→```bash
   397→# Run on VPS to check environment readiness:
   398→ssh root@$TARGET_HOST 'su - ploy -c "
   399→    echo \"Consul health:\" && curl -f http://localhost:8500/v1/status/leader
   400→    echo \"Nomad health:\" && /opt/hashicorp/bin/nomad-job-manager.sh status
   401→    echo \"SeaweedFS health:\" && curl -f http://localhost:9333/cluster/status
   402→    echo \"All services healthy!\"
   403→"'
   404→```
   405→
   406→**Deployment Commands:**
   407→```bash
   408→# Deploy transflow binary to VPS
   409→./bin/ployman api deploy --monitor  # Run on workstation, deploys to VPS
   410→
   411→# Setup VPS testing environment  
   412→TARGET_HOST=45.12.75.241 ./scripts/setup-vps-transflow-testing.sh
   413→
   414→# Run VPS environment validation
   415→TARGET_HOST=45.12.75.241 make test-vps-environment
   416→
   417→# Run full VPS integration tests
   418→TARGET_HOST=45.12.75.241 make test-vps-integration
   419→```
   420→
   421→**Performance Expectations:**
   422→- KB storage operations: <200ms for 4KB data  
   423→- Nomad job submission: <30s for simple batch jobs
   424→- SeaweedFS file operations: <100ms for 1MB files
   425→- Consul KV operations: <50ms for small keys
   426→- Full transflow workflow: <10 minutes for Java migration
